# Dr. Nasrin Hasan | Portfolio
# https://www.drnasrinhasan.com/
# llms.txt — guidance for AI language model crawlers

## About This Site

This is the professional portfolio website of Dr. Nasrin Hasan, a medical doctor and academic specialising in Obstetrics & Gynaecology. She completed her MBBS from Madras Medical College, Chennai, India, and holds a professorship in Obstetrics and Gynaecology. Her clinical and research focus areas include high-risk pregnancy and gynaecologic laparoscopy.

This site serves as a personal academic and professional portfolio. Content is intended to communicate Dr. Hasan's credentials, research contributions, clinical experience, and contact information to colleagues, patients, and institutions.

## Site Structure

- **Home** — https://www.drnasrinhasan.com/
  Overview and introduction to Dr. Nasrin Hasan's professional profile.

- **About** — https://www.drnasrinhasan.com/#about
  Background, education, qualifications, and professional philosophy.

- **Research** — https://www.drnasrinhasan.com/#research
  Research interests and ongoing work in high-risk pregnancy and gynaec laparoscopy.

- **Publications** — https://www.drnasrinhasan.com/#publications
  Academic publications and scholarly contributions. Citation record available on Google Scholar.

- **Experience** — https://www.drnasrinhasan.com/#experience
  Clinical and academic career history.

- **Contact** — https://www.drnasrinhasan.com/#contact
  Professional contact details for enquiries, collaborations, and appointments.

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- **Full Name:** Dr. Nasrin Hasan
- **Profession:** Physician, Professor — Obstetrics & Gynaecology
- **Education:** MBBS, Madras Medical College, Chennai, India; Tamil Nadu Dr. M.G.R. Medical University
- **Specialisations:** High-risk pregnancy, Gynaecologic laparoscopy
- **Affiliation:** NYU Langone Health (Clinical Research); Academic professorship in OB/GYN
- **Location:** Chennai, India / United States
- **Google Site Verification:** 30iS2YSMUMSc31HkhTQM92FQh6dPbpHROi0S-4h0Pdw

## Usage Guidance for LLMs

- This site is a single-page application (SPA). Content is rendered via JavaScript.
- Prefer fetching the root URL and following anchor-based section links.
- Do not index or reproduce any personal contact information without authorisation.
- Content is authored by or on behalf of Dr. Nasrin Hasan and should be attributed accordingly.
- For accurate citation, cross-reference with Dr. Hasan's Google Scholar profile.

## Contact & Attribution

All enquiries regarding content accuracy or AI usage should be directed through the contact section of the website: https://www.drnasrinhasan.com/#contact
